headline: OpenAI-compatible API slashes inference costs to $0.22 per million tokens
body: TokkeyCC launched an OpenAI-compatible API providing access to 100 AI models at significantly reduced pricing. For healthcare organizations building clinical decision support, documentation automation, or diagnostic assistance tools, this cost reduction directly improves the financial case for AI implementation. Lower inference costs mean healthcare systems can deploy more sophisticated models across broader populations without proportional budget increases. This pricing pressure in the vendor landscape will force existing healthcare AI incumbents to justify their higher margins or lose adoption in value-based care environments where cost containment is critical.
